paragraphEndLine: I am always open to discussing emerging technologies, brainstorming innovative project ideas, and exploring new opportunities with product-driven companies. Feel free to connect with me on LinkedIn or check out my GitHub to see what I'm up to!

experience.description: Specializing in the development and automation of enterprise-grade applications within the Oracle EBS ecosystem. I leverage PL/SQL, Java, and Autosys to architect scalable solutions for complex business workflows.
highlights: Engineered and deployed full-stack enterprise solutions, focusing on modularity and high-availability during accelerated technical delivery cycles.
Streamlined business processes by developing robust backend services and RESTful APIs utilizing Java and Spring Boot.
Optimized mission-critical database workflows and PL/SQL procedures, significantly improving data processing efficiency and system reliability.
Collaborated in an Agile environment to troubleshoot complex production issues and automate scheduled tasks using Autosys, reducing manual intervention.

experience.description: Architected and spearheaded the technical transition of the Training & Placement Cell’s web infrastructure to a scalable microservices-based model.
highlights: Optimized platform performance, achieving a 66% reduction in page load time through aggressive code refactoring and asset optimization.
Engineered a modular Microservices architecture using Docker to ensure high availability and seamless deployment of placement features.
Directed a cross-functional team of student developers, implementing Agile practices for weekly sprint planning and task delegation.
Designed and deployed responsive, mobile-first web layouts, improving accessibility for 2,000+ student users.

experience.description: Spearheaded the development of a high-performance, real-time communication suite, focusing on low-latency data streaming and enterprise-grade security.
highlights: Architected a scalable video conferencing and instant messaging platform using WebRTC for P2P media streaming and Socket.io for real-time signaling.
Engineered a robust, stateless authentication framework using JWT (JSON Web Tokens), enhancing platform security and user session management.
Developed a centralized library of responsive UI components, reducing frontend development time for subsequent feature releases by 30%.
Optimized data transmission protocols to ensure seamless communication across low-bandwidth network environments.

education.description: Focused on core Computer Science fundamentals, including DSA, DBMS, and Operating Systems, while maintaining active participation in competitive programming.
